name: Skibidi Shooter
author: Poki
description: Skibidi Shooter is a shooting game in which you have to hold off the Skibidi Toilets that are invading the city! Use your handgun, sniper rifle and machine gun to make your way trough the different levels. For the truly skilled agents, there’s Endless Mode. In this game mode, you can take on as many waves of Skibidi Toilets as you can handle. Join the Cameramen resistance and fight back! How to play Skibidi Shooter? Shoot: use the mouse to aim and shoot! Change weapon: use the 1,2 and 3 keys to change weapons! Who created Skibidi Shooter? Skibidi Shooter is created by Kool Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Skibidi Shooter for free? You can play Skibidi Shooter for free on Poki. Can I play Skibidi Shooter on mobile devices and desktop? Skibidi Shooter can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
